milestone: Ioffe-Pritchard 자기최소 트랩 B장 + trap depth (RTSC getdp 4.0 · Wheeler 폐형해 상속) — verify

physics.trap_type: magnetic-minimum (magnetic bottle) — two coaxial mirror coils, |B| local min at center rising outward; holds NEUTRAL low-field-seeking ground-state antihydrogen (μ ≈ μ_B)
physics.on_axis_loop_B: B_loop(ζ) = μ₀·I·a² / (2·(a²+ζ²)^(3/2))   [inherited RTSC/Wheeler primitive — hexa-lang/stdlib/material/magnet/current_loop_offaxis.hexa loop_offaxis_Bz at r=0, NOVEL-TOOL M2.4]
physics.mirror_superposition: B(z) = B_loop(z−s/2) + B_loop(z+s/2);  s>a ⇒ z=0 is a true on-axis minimum

coil_params.note: s/a = 4 > Helmholtz spacing (s>a) ⇒ center z=0 is a genuine on-axis B minimum (magnetic bottle); coils at z = ±0.20 m

verify.form: hexa verify --expr <fn> ... (hexa CLI, NOT LLM self-judgement; @D g5 verbatim)
verify.rtsc_inheritance: reuses the RTSC/Wheeler on-axis current-loop closed form (loop_offaxis_Bz r=0 / wheeler.hexa family) — magnet toolchain directly inherited per ANTIMATTER ⓺ design
verify.getdp_FEM_cross_check: SKIPPED (strictly optional; closed-form verify fully landed, kept scope tight)
